title: AIIMS Awantipora – Faculty – 94 Posts
shortInfo: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences Awantipora (AIIMS Awantipora) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 94 Faculty. Candidates with MS/MD, M.Ch, DM Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 20-05-2026, and closes on 18-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Awantipora website, aiims.edu.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Awantipora Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 94 Assistant Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences Awantipora (AIIMS Awantipora) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 94 Faculty. Candidates with MS/MD, M.Ch, DM Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 20-05-2026, and closes on 18-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Awantipora website, aiims.edu.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 12 to Level 14-A as per 7th CPC (Rs. 101500–220400/-) depending on post

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the AIIMS Exams portal at www.aiimsexams.ac.in. The online portal will be active from 20-05-2026 to 18-06-2026 (5:00 PM). No physical/hard copy applications will be accepted. No documents, including the registration slip, are required to be sent in physical form. Candidates must upload supporting documents at the time of online registration itself - failure to upload mandatory documents will result in a score of zero for the respective criterion. Candidates may apply for more than one post code if they meet the eligibility criteria for each. No corrections will be permitted after online submission of the form; candidates are advised to fill the registration form carefully. Candidates currently employed in Government/Semi-Government/Quasi-Government organizations must upload their NOC at the time of online registration.
seo_tags: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Awantipora Faculty Recruitment 2026
